description: Calligraphic letter in Judaeo-Arabic. The sender has only 20 dinars and a male slave (waṣīf). He intends to sell the slave for 30 dinars and will send. Meanwhile he asked al-Asʿad Abū Saʿd b. Abū l-Munajjā to pay for him 30 to al-Makīn. Also mentions trouble with Abū l-Mufaḍḍal Ibn al-ʿAnbarī. Dating: Likely late 12th or early 13th century. (Information mainly from Goitein's index card.)
